scenario_description: The user wants a promotion-type breakdown but doesn't specify the target column or output format. The agent asks, then summarizes Revenue by Promotion Type on Sheet2.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me create a promotion type breakdown
On Sheet2, summarize total Revenue by Promotion Type, with columns named 'Promotion Type' and 'Total Revenue', then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/EntireSummerSales.xlsx'); ok = 'Sheet2' in xl.sheet_names; df2 = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/EntireSummerSales.xlsx', sheet_name='Sheet2') if ok else None; print('PASSED' if ok and df2 is not None and 'Total Revenue' in df2.columns else 'FAILED')"
